title: Bump to google/chrome/m132 (milestone 132)
body:
**Description of Change**

<!--
    Describe your changes here.
-->
This PR bumps SkiaSharp's skia to milestone 132. I've tried to keep the changes minimal to aid the review. Primarily, there's a merge commit from the skiasharp branch into google/chrome/m132. I've tried to keep the final version as close as possible to upstream, which wasn't that hard because the upstream changes from M119 to M132 don't seem to affect the C API too much. After the merge there is a commit to adjust the C API (mostly changes to how objects are constructed and some namespace changes, etc.). Further commits are further adjustments to fix the build and whatnot.

Although the PR looks big, it can straightforwardly be reviewed by diffing the head of the PR branch against `google/chrome/m132` and `skiasharp` (obviously, `skiasharp` will have additional commits since this PR is published, so actually don't use the most up-to-date `skiasharp`, but the last `skiasharp` commit included in this PR). Compare the PR branch against `skiasharp` for the C API parts (e.g. include/c, src/c, etc.) and against  `google/chrome/m132` for everything else.

**SkiaSharp Issue**

<!--
    Provide links to SkiaSharp issues here.
    Ensure that a GitHub issue was created for your feature or bug fix before sending PR.
-->

Related to https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/issues/<issue-number>

**API Changes**
`sk_colortype_t` now has `BGRA_10101010_XR_SK_COLORTYPE` and `RGB_F16F16F16X_SK_COLORTYPE`.
`gr_vk_backendcontext_t`, `gr_vk_ycbcrconversioninfo_t` and `sk_jpegencoder_options_t` have some field adjustments to match changes in upstream.

Now, this doesn't matter for SkiaSharp's C# bindings, but Milestone 122 has made changes to SkFontMgr, such as removing `SkFontMgr::RefDefault()`, so some changes were made to accomodate that, included in `sk_default_fontmgr.h` and `sk_default_fontmgr.cpp`.


**Behavioral Changes**

<!--
    Describe any non-bug related behavioral changes that may change how users app behaves
    when upgrading to this version of the codebase.
-->

**Required SkiaSharp PR**

Requires https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3560

<!--
    Replace this with the full URL to the skia PR.
-->

**PR Checklist**

- [ ] Rebased on top of `skiasharp` at time of PR
- [ ] Changes adhere to coding standard
- [ ] Updated documentation
